reasoning_content:
The StartOfLine detection is still not working correctly. Let me think about this more carefully.

Looking at the expected output:
```
int 'int'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:1>
identifier 'main'	 [LeadingSpace] Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:5>
l_paren '('		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:9>
r_paren ')'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:10>
l_brace '{'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:1:11>
return 'return'	 [StartOfLine] [LeadingSpace]	Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:5>
numeric_constant '3'	 [LeadingSpace]	Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:12>
semi ';'		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:2:13>
r_brace '}'	 [StartOfLine]	Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:1>
eof ''		Loc=</workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c:3:2>
```

So:
- `int` has [StartOfLine] - it's the first token on line 1


- `main` has [LeadingSpace] - it has a space before it
- `(` has no flags - it's not at start of line and no leading space
- `)` has no flags
- `{` has no flags
- `return` has [StartOfLine] and [LeadingSpace] - it's the first token on line 2 and has leading space
- `3` has [LeadingSpace]
- `;` has no flags
- `}` has [StartOfLine] - it's the first token on line 3

I see the pattern now. Tokens are marked with [StartOfLine] when they're the first token on a line, and [LeadingSpace] when there's whitespace before them. This helps track the precise formatting and positioning of tokens in the source code.

The key insight is that column position alone doesn't determine start-of-line status. Instead, I need to examine the hidden tokens to the left of each token, specifically checking for newline characters that indicate a line break.

My approach will involve carefully analyzing the hidden tokens to accurately determine whether a token truly starts a new line, considering the nuanced whitespace and newline context.

tool_call.name: file_editor

summary: Fix StartOfLine detection to check only last hidden token
